title: soyeria lampsanoides
intro: Soyeria lampsanoides, also known as the 'butterfly tree' or 'butterfly tree with yellow flowers', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a medicinal plant used to treat various ailments due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers are used to prepare herbal remedies that can help in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, among other health benefits. Soyeria lampsanoides can be prepared into tea, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as skin infections and respiratory issues.
